title: CertiPatch: Specification Repair for Frozen Language Models with Replayable Empirical Certificates
abstract: Train-certify-verify pipeline with counterexample-guided constrained repair and reproducibility gates for fail-closed evidence in production sign-off.
whyItMatters: Turns model repair into a verifiable workflow teams can trust during production sign-off.

title: AvalancheLLM: Token-Layer Activation Event Cascades in LLMs under Gain Scaling
abstract: Rate-matched diagnostics with strong controls and deterministic artifact packaging to detect instability under gain and scaling changes.
whyItMatters: Helps teams detect brittle model behavior before it becomes a production incident.

title: RIA: Retokenization Invariance Atlas
abstract: Deterministic audits for semantics-preserving formatting effects in LLM QA with no-truncation and semantics gates.
whyItMatters: Provides auditable reliability evidence when prompt formatting changes could alter outcomes.

title: ScrubID: Identifiability-Aware Auditing for Mechanistic Interpretability
abstract: Claim auditing with non-identifiability certificates to provide verifiable interpretability evidence and reduce overclaiming.
whyItMatters: Reduces interpretability overclaims by requiring evidence that can be independently checked.

title: CacheMedic++: Robust KV-Cache Stabilization via Self-Distillation
abstract: Deterministic KV-cache corruption protocols and distillation-driven repair operators with seed/holdout replication and bootstrap confidence intervals.
whyItMatters: Improves serving stability by making KV-cache failures reproducible, diagnosable, and repairable.

title: CIS Technical Report
abstract: Technical report documenting the CIS reliability approach, evaluation criteria, and implementation notes for production-grade AI systems.
whyItMatters: Translates deterministic reliability design into a practical report teams can adopt in real delivery environments.

title: Discover-Then-Distill: Separating Test-Time Adaptation from Self-Distillation Consolidation
abstract: Compute-matched discover-then-distill pipeline with ablation suite and retention-transfer diagnostics for clear separation of adaptation and consolidation effects.
whyItMatters: Clarifies how to separate short-term adaptation from durable model improvement in production tuning loops.
